evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Knowledge of data governance, data quality, and control methodologies
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Data governance/quality signals are balanced against a scale-up startup framing with 'real schedule flexibility and results-oriented culture', giving roughly equal weight to rigour and delivery pace.
evidence.domain_risk: internal ERP managing operations, logistics, risk, and finances
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role touches financial and risk data feeding an internal ERP for a car rental scale-up but with no explicit regulatory or audit language, keeping it at moderate.
evidence.collaboration_width: Sales; Fleet; Customer Experience; BI team; data team
evidence.data_team_maturity: Contribute to evolution and improvement of corporate dashboards in Power BI, ensuring consistency and quality
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A tech team of 30+ people, existing dbt models, and corporate Power BI dashboards already in production point to a growing, established mid-stage function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop and maintain analytical models in dbt, managing table structure, data lineage, and transformation efficiency
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical scope (dbt, table structure, data lineage, DAX, Power BI semantic modeling) gives a concrete Tuesday-morning picture, consistent with hiring-manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Sales, Fleet, Customer Experience) and BI team
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Named partners span commercial (Sales, Customer Experience), operational (Fleet), and internal_data (BI team) functions with no single one dominating, giving mixed orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Guide and support leaders and stakeholders on leveraging available data for business needs
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role supports leaders and delivers scoped analyses/recommendations rather than setting overall data strategy, an execution framing.
evidence.ai_role: Generative AI tools experience in analytical contexts
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Generative AI tool experience appears only as a nice-to-have without being a core expected skill, so it is classified as none per the vague-phrase rule.
evidence.testing_framing: Knowledge of data governance, data quality, and control methodologies
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data governance and quality appear as a required knowledge area in the qualifications list rather than an owned responsibility with an action verb, so it is tool_listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data governance and consistency of corporate dashboards are named concerns but framed around reporting quality rather than regulatory or compliance risk, placing it at moderate.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Contribute to evolution and improvement of corporate dashboards in Power BI
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role both evolves existing dashboards/infrastructure and performs new ad-hoc analyses, a mix of greenfield and fix/scale work.
evidence.loss_aversion: ensure data governance — governance and quality are named concerns but framed around dashboard consistency, not compliance risk.
evidence.work_arrangement: Hybrid model with Madrid center office (minimum 2 days/week)
